title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Oil Industry Stocks Advance as Oil Prices Climb
text: The S&P 500 was little changed to start the week on Monday, July 31, 2023, edging 0.2% higher as oil stocks gained on the back of higher oil prices.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Beats on Q2 Earnings, Issues Weak Outlook
text: Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) second-quarter 2023 results benefit from the robust Industrial and Food Retail segments. However, its dull outlook for 2023 is concerning.

title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (MTD) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE:MTD ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Adam Uhlman - Head-Investor Relations Patrick Kaltenbach - Chief Executive Officer Shawn Vadala - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Daniel Arias - Stifel Jack Meehan - Nephron Research Derik de Bruin - Bank of America Patrick Donnelly - Citigroup Vijay Kumar - Evercore Matthew Sykes - Goldman Sachs Catherine Schulte - Baird Joshua Waldman - Cleveland Research Rachel Vatnsdal - JPMorgan Elizabeth Garcia - UBS Timothy Daley - Wells Fargo Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Mettler-Toledo Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. My name is Briana and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Mettler-Toledo (MTD) came out with quarterly earnings of $10.19 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $9.99 per share. This compares to earnings of $9.39 per share a year ago.

title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) today announced second quarter results for 2023. Provided below are the highlights: Reported sales were flat compared with the prior-year. In local currency, sales increased 2% in the quarter as currency reduced sales growth by 2%. Net earnings per diluted share as reported (EPS) were $9.69, compared with $9.29 in the prior-year period. Adjusted EPS was $10.19, an increase of 9% over the prior-year amount of $9.39. A.

title: What's in the Offing for Mettler-Toledo's (MTD) Q2 Earnings?
text: Mettler-Toledo's MTD) second-quarter results are likely to reflect the benefits of strong momentum across the laboratory, food retail and industrial businesses amid macroeconomic headwinds.

title: Mettler-Toledo Stock: Weighing The Potential Here
text: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. is a premium and dominant player in weight instruments. The business has seen long-term growth, accompanied by continued share buybacks. While a pricey valuation has come down a long way, that should be seen in the light of rising risk-free rates, although appeal appears to be evident here.
